title: Air Fryer Wire Rack with 3 Skewers – 19cm Diameter – Double Layer Cooking – Stainless Steel – Elevates Food for Even Crisping – Fits Most Air Fryers – Includes 3 Skewers
features: Double Layer Cooking: Increases air fryer capacity by separating food for even, efficient cooking.
Includes 3 Skewers: Perfect for grilling kebabs, meat, vegetables, and more in your air fryer.
Promotes Even Crisping: Elevates food to allow hot air to circulate around for a crisp, thorough cook.
Durable Stainless Steel: Made from food-safe stainless steel; easy to clean and built to last.
Compact & Versatile: Fits most standard air fryers with a 19cm diameter rack and 17.5cm skewers.
description: Upgrade your air fryer setup with this 19cm double layer wire rack, complete with three stainless steel skewers. Designed to elevate food and improve hot air circulation, this rack helps achieve a deliciously crisp finish on meats, fish, or vegetables. The double layer design maximizes cooking space, letting you prepare more in one go—ideal for busy kitchens or family meals. The included skewers make it easy to enjoy kebabs or grilled treats straight from your air fryer. Made from food-safe stainless steel, it's durable, easy to clean, and fits most standard air fryer baskets. Hand wash only; use oven gloves when handling after use.
